title: Test Operator screens (Coverage, Workbench, Agent Chat)

inputs.description:
Test operator screens using Playwright:

**Coverage (http://localhost:5173/operator/coverage)**:
1. Navigate, verify charts render (recharts pie/bar)
2. Check coverage stats for date, place, publisher, agent
3. Verify confidence distribution displays
4. Take screenshot

**Workbench (http://localhost:5173/operator/workbench)**:
1. Navigate, verify table renders
2. Test filtering, sorting, pagination if available
3. Check for editable cells
4. Take screenshot

**Agent Chat (http://localhost:5173/operator/agent)**:
1. Navigate, verify UI loads
2. Check coverage sidebar
3. If possible, test a simple agent query
4. Take screenshot

**Review (http://localhost:5173/operator/review)**:
1. Navigate, verify loads
2. Take screenshot

Report all findings for each screen.
inputs.taskName: Test Operator screens (Coverage, Workbench, Agent Chat)
